team_description: Existentialist figures from the literary world, exploring the meaning of existence, freedom, and choice. Hamlet's hesitation, Don Quixote's persistence—experience profound literary conversations with AI.

members.name: Hamlet
members.description: Prince of Denmark in Shakespeare's tragedy, originator of 'To be or not to be', represents profound inquiry into the meaning of human existence.

members.name: Don Quixote
members.description: The idealistic knight from Cervantes' novel, persistently pursuing his dreams, symbolizes humanity's eternal pursuit of ideals.
